label: Lupine Controls
description: Control the Lupine SL Grano F from the Karoo app or the in-ride field, with ride-aware connection handling and a Lupine-specific control surface.
releaseNotes:
* Removed manual lamp selection from the UI flow
* Holding the large button for 3 seconds now starts search automatically
* The app connects automatically to the first found Lupine lamp
* Updated user guidance and published install metadata for the new beta
